channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelenskyy calls for direct negotiations with Putin in neutral country
item.description: Ukrainian President Zelenskyy wrote a public letter to Putin proposing face-to-face talks hosted by a neutral third country, suggesting Switzerland, Turkey or Arab states. He proposed a full ceasefire during negotiations and an all-for-all prisoner exchange as a first step.

item.title: ⚖️ US federal judge strikes down Trump immigration policy affecting 39 countries
item.description: A federal judge in Boston struck down a Trump administration policy that made it harder for immigrants from 39 African, Asian, Latin American and Middle Eastern countries to stay in the US. The ruling said the policy threw immigrants into "indeterminate legal limbo."

item.title: 🏛️ Senate passes billion immigration enforcement bill after all-night session
item.description: The Senate approved funding for ICE and Border Patrol through the end of Trump's term after Republicans defeated multiple attempts to ban Trump's controversial .776 billion settlement fund for allies claiming political persecution.

item.title: 🛸 ISS astronauts briefly take shelter during leak repair on Russian side
item.description: NASA ordered astronauts to shelter in a SpaceX capsule while Russian cosmonauts worked to fix a fresh leak aboard the International Space Station. The crew returned to normal operations after repairs were paused.

item.title: 🌍 Half of Latin Americans deported from US to Congo have returned home
item.description: More than half of the 15 Latin Americans deported to Congo under Trump's third-country deportation policy have returned to their countries of origin, even though US judges ruled they likely face persecution at home.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US House Defies Trump, Passes Ukraine Aid Package and Russia Sanctions
item.description: The US House approved legislation supporting Ukraine with direct loans and assistance while imposing new sanctions on Russia, marking a significant rebuke of President Trump's foreign policy stance.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanon President Accuses Iran of Using Country as Bargaining Chip in US Talks
item.description: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun delivered sharp criticism of Tehran, stating Iran is using Lebanon as leverage in negotiations with the United States amid ongoing conflict with Israel.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine-Russia Exchange 185 POWs Each in Latest Prisoner Swap
item.description: Ukraine and Russia conducted another prisoner exchange, each releasing 185 service personnel in the latest swap between the warring nations.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Tracks Dutch Frigate Through Taiwan Strait
item.description: China's military dispatched naval and air assets to monitor the Dutch frigate De Ruyter during its transit through the Taiwan Strait, highlighting continued tensions in the region.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Macron, Starmer, Merz to Meet Zelenskiy in London on June 7
item.description: French President Macron, UK Prime Minister Starmer, and German Chancellor Merz will hold talks with Ukrainian President Zelenskiy in London on Sunday in continued European support for Ukraine.

item.title: 🇮🇪🇮🇱 Irish PM Bans Israeli Ministers Over Flotilla Comments
item.description: Ireland banned Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich and National Security Minister Itamar Ben Gvir for anti-Palestinian remarks and actions related to the Gaza flotilla, calling their behavior a push for the "elimination of Palestinians from Palestine."

item.title: 🇸🇮🇮🇱 Slovenia Removes Palestinian Flag in Sharp Pro-Israel Shift
item.description: Slovenia's new prime minister removed the Palestinian flag from government buildings in a symbolic break from the previous administration's stance, following Slovenia's earlier condemnation of Israel over Gaza.

item.title: 🇷🇺💰 Russian Budget Deficit Doubles to $81 Billion Amid War Strain
item.description: Russia's federal budget deficit reached 6 trillion rubles ($81.4 billion) in the first five months of 2026, doubling from the same period last year as war costs continue to mount.

item.title: 🚀🇺🇸🇨🇳 SpaceX IPO Bars China and Hong Kong Investors
item.description: SpaceX underwriters have barred investors in China and Hong Kong from participating in the IPO, with the company seeking to raise $75 billion in what could be one of the largest public offerings ever.

item.title: 🏛️🇺🇸 Trump Urges Mass Firings at US Intelligence Agencies
item.description: President Donald Trump told the Wall Street Journal he wants acting DNI Bill Pulte to begin firing large numbers of intelligence community employees as part of a major shake-up of US spy agencies.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇺🇦⚔️ US House Approves Ukraine Aid and Russia Sanctions
item.description: The House passed the Ukraine Support Act 226-195 after a discharge petition forced the vote, defying President Trump and Senate Republicans. A handful of Republicans joined Democrats in supporting the legislation.

item.title: 🛸⚠️ ISS Astronauts Briefly Ordered to Prepare for Evacuation
item.description: NASA ordered five astronauts to shelter in docked SpaceX Dragon spacecraft for two hours as a Russian crew attempted to fix a worsening air leak in the Zvezda service module. Operations have since returned to normal.

item.title: 🇸🇴⚔️ Somalia Government Restores Order After Capital Fighting
item.description: Somali security forces restored order in two districts of Mogadishu after government troops and militias allied with opposition politicians clashed, forcing some civilians to flee.

item.title: 🇮🇷 US-Iran Peace Deal Hangs on Frozen Assets, Sanctions, and Nuclear Inspections
item.description: Reuters outlines the key obstacles to a US-Iran peace agreement, including billion in frozen Iranian assets, the status of Irans nuclear program, and demands from Tehrans allies like Hezbollah that complicate negotiations.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇰🇵 Chinas Xi Jinping to Visit North Korea for First Time in Nearly Seven Years
item.description: Beijing announced President Xis two-day visit to Pyongyang starting June 8, signaling Chinas intent to strengthen ties with its only formal treaty ally amid shifting regional dynamics.

item.title: ☢️ Russia and Uzbekistan Begin Construction of First Nuclear Power Plant in Central Asia
item.description: The Kremlin announced the start of construction on a Russian-built nuclear power plant in Uzbekistan, the first in post-Soviet Central Asia, aimed at meeting growing regional energy demands.

item.title: 🇫🇷 France Opens War Crime Probe Over Israel Flotilla Raid
item.description: French prosecutors have opened a war crimes investigation into Israel's treatment of activists aboard a Gaza-bound flotilla. Two of more than 30 French activists remain in Israeli custody.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Destroys Russian Drone Base at Occupied Donetsk Airport
item.description: Ukrainian forces conducted an operation to degrade Russia's military capabilities at the occupied Donetsk Airport, destroying a drone base. The operation continues Ukraine's strategy of targeting Russian military infrastructure.

item.title: ☢️ Trump Iran Envoys Quietly Convene Nuclear Experts at Oak Ridge
item.description: President Trump's envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner traveled to the national lab in Oak Ridge, Tennessee on Thursday for consultations with nuclear experts as US-Iran negotiations continue.

item.title: 🇦🇲 Armenia Faces Pivotal Election on Future Away From Russia
item.description: Armenia's parliamentary election on June 7 will test whether the small democracy can chart its own future and how much the country will pivot away from Russian influence toward the West.
